data.title: Langflow allows creation of local AI agents on NVIDIA RTX GPUs, ensuring privacy, cost-effectiveness, and performance.
data.description: Langflow is empowering AI enthusiasts to develop personalized AI agents using cutting-edge NVIDIA RTX GPUs. This innovative platform provides users with a no-code interface, ensuring privacy, cost-effectiveness, and enhanced performance. With Langflow, individuals can leverage the power of AI technology with ease.

data.title: Stocks of crypto companies Coinbase, Riot Platforms, CleanSpark drop with BTC amid fears of tariffs. Marked fall due to job data, inflation, tariff fears.
data.description: The stock prices of Coinbase, Riot Platforms, and CleanSpark experienced significant declines during a widespread market downturn. This decrease was fueled by negative job data, worries about inflation, and renewed fears of tariffs.

data.title: BioConsortia secured funding to launch new nitrogen-fixing biofertilizer, fueling global expansion.
data.description: On Wednesday, BioConsortia, based in Davis, California, announced the successful closure of a significant round of financing aimed at expediting the release of their cutting-edge nitrogen-fixing biofertilizer. The funds will also be utilized to support the company's expansion efforts on a global scale.

data.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. acquired RSC Topco, Inc., parent company of Accession Risk Management Group.
data.description: On August 1st, 2025 in Daytona Beach, Florida, Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) finalized the acquisition of RSC Topco, Inc., the parent company of Accession Risk Management Group, Inc.

data.title: Withum joins with Freed Maxick, P.C. enhancing Healthcare, Audit & Tax in Upstate and Western NY.
data.description: Withum is broadening its reach into Upstate and Western New York, enhancing its Healthcare, Audit, Advisory, and Tax services. The expansion was announced by Freed Maxick, P.C., a Buffalo, NY-based public accounting firm, on August 1, 2025. This move signifies a marked growth in Withum's presence in the region, providing a boost to their expertise in various sectors.

data.title: Stocks drop as Dow falls 500 points due to Trump tariffs, weak jobs report; bond yields also decline.
data.description: Early on Friday, there was a significant drop in stock prices due to a series of unfavorable news stories. This included the announcement of additional tariffs by President Trump and a disappointing jobs report. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 500 points in response to these developments. Bond yields also experienced a sharp decline. This live coverage is detailed in the Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: HORNE ranked 30th on INSIDE Public Accounting's Top 500 Firms list for 2025, among elite firms.
data.description: RIDGELOAND, Miss. - As of August 1, 2025, professional services firm HORNE has achieved the prestigious 30th position among elite firms on INSIDE Public Accounting's Top 500 Firms list for 2025. INSIDE Public Accounting, known for ranking the most significant public firms, recognized HORNE's exceptional performance by placing it among the top 30 firms nationally.

data.title: Newell Brands Inc. stocks fall due to tariffs & soft demand, reports 2Q earnings with EPS of 24 cents & $1.935 billion sales (down 4.8% YoY).
data.description: Newell Brands Inc. (NASDAQ: NWL) saw a decrease in its shares after releasing its second-quarter earnings report. The company, known for brands like Rubbermaid, Sharpie, and Yankee Candle, reported an adjusted earnings per share of 24 cents, matching analyst expectations. Quarterly sales amounted to $1.935 billion, showing a 4.8% decrease from the previous year and falling short of the anticipated $1.947 billion. Core sales were down by 4.4% year-over-year, indicating a slowdown in consumer demand. This information can be found in full detail on Benzinga.com, along with updates on Chevron.

data.title: NAR report: Pending home sales drop 0.8% in June, 2.8% from last year. Provides data for real estate market.
data.description: In July 30, 2025, it was reported that pending home sales saw a decrease of 0.8% compared to the previous month and a 2.8% decline from the same period last year, as per the National Association of REALTORS® Pending Home Sales report. This report offers crucial information to individuals in the real estate industry, such as agents, as well as homebuyers and sellers, regarding the volume of home sales that are currently under contract.

data.title: Dogecoin Cash Inc. files provisional patent for Dogecoin Protocol Framework: USPTO App No. 63/849,485, dated July 23, 2025.
data.description: An application with the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) bearing the number 63/849,485 was submitted on July 23, 2025.

data.title: Dominion Energy reports Q2 net income $760M, EPS 88 cents, revenue $3.81B, beating estimates.
data.description: In the latest financial report, Dominion Energy Inc. (NYSE: D) revealed impressive second-quarter figures. The company recorded a net income of $760 million, equivalent to 88 cents per share. This marked a substantial rise from the earnings of $563 million, or 64 cents per share, during the corresponding period in 2024. Adjusted earnings per share stood at 75 cents, surpassing the estimated figure of 72 cents. Dominion Energy Inc. saw a notable 9.3% year-over-year surge in operating revenue for the quarter, reaching $3.81 billion. This information was disclosed in the company's recent release and further details are accessible through Benzinga.com.
Sirens Wailed in Multiple Locations in Israel After Yemen Missiles Struck

data.title: Trump admin plans pilot program for Medicare/Medicaid to cover weight-loss drugs like Ozempic, Wegovy, Manejaro, and Zepbound. Initiative set to launch in April 2026 for Medicaid and January 2027 for Medicare. CMMI to oversee the program.
data.description: The Trump administration is developing a pilot program to potentially offer weight-loss medications to certain individuals on Medicare and Medicaid. The program would allow state Medicaid programs and Medicare Part D plans to consider covering GLP-1 drugs like Novo Nordisk A/S' Ozempic and Wegovy, and Eli Lilly And Co's Mounjaro and Zepbound for weight management. Additionally, Eli Lilly's Orforglipron may be included pending approval in 2026. The initiative is scheduled to commence in April 2026 for Medicaid and January 2027 for Medicare, operating through the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation (CMMI). This initiative aims to explore new payment models to enhance care and reduce healthcare costs.

Rape trial requested against PSG player Achraf Hakimi (Nanterre prosecutor's office)

data.title: Stock market falls due to Trump tariffs and weak jobs report; Microsoft, Meta, Amazon in focus. Key earnings from Meta, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon.
data.description: Last week, the stock market experienced a significant decline due to concerns over Trump's tariffs and a disappointing jobs report. Key players such as Meta Platforms, Microsoft, Apple, and Amazon reported their earnings, with Meta, Microsoft, and Amazon drawing a lot of attention. Overall, the market saw a decline, with investors closely monitoring these developments.

data.title: Amazon's stock fell after Q2 cloud revenue growth lagged behind Google and Microsoft, raising concerns about its position in AI.
data.description: On Friday, the stock of Amazon experienced a decline following its second-quarter cloud revenue growth not meeting expectations in contrast to Google and Microsoft's results. This has raised concerns regarding whether Amazon is falling behind Microsoft and Google in the AI sector. The comparison was made due to the underperformance of Amazon's growth numbers in this quarter.

data.title: Netflix aims to become the next Disney for a new generation. Implications for Netflix stock discussed in Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Netflix seems to be aiming to transform into an entertainment giant similar to Walt Disney but tailored to a younger audience. This shift could impact Netflix's stock performance significantly.

data.title: Anaergia S.r.l. to expand and upgrade Moglia anaerobic digestion facility for Bioenerys in Italy, improving capacity.
data.description: In Treviglio, Italy, and Burlington, Ontario, Anaergia Inc. has announced a new agreement through its subsidiary, Anaergia S.r.l., with a subsidiary of Bioenergy. As per the agreement, Anaergia will enhance the Moglia anaerobic digestion facility in northern Italy. The upgrade will lead to a substantial increase in capacity, transforming the plant significantly. Anaergia's stock market identifiers are TSX:ANRG and OTCQX:ANRGF.

data.title: Horizon Quantum partners with QuEra to enhance quantum software ecosystem, aims to simplify quantum programming.
data.description: Horizon Quantum Computing Pte. Ltd. (Horizon Quantum) based in Singapore and QuEra Computing from Boston revealed that Horizon Quantum is now a part of the QuEra Quantum Alliance. This partnership aims to advance software development tools for quantum computers. Horizon Quantum focuses on simplifying quantum computer programming similar to conventional systems. QuEra Computing specializes in neutral-atom quantum computing. The collaboration intends to enhance quantum computing capabilities and streamline programming processes. This partnership combines Horizon Quantum's expertise in software tools with QuEra Computing's proficiency in neutral-atom quantum methods, signaling an important step towards quantum technology advancement.
